<a id="zanna-data-xml"></a>
### `Zanna.Data.Xml`

Provides Xml functionality for structured data processing.

`Zanna.Data.Xml` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to
construct the class directly. Its public surface exposes operations including `Parse`,
`ParseResult`, `IsValid`, `Element`.

<a id="zanna-data-jsonstream"></a>
### `Zanna.Data.JsonStream`

Provides SAX-style streaming JSON parser.

Create `Zanna.Text.JsonStream` values through its registered constructor and use the returned
object with the instance members below. Its public surface exposes properties such as `Depth`,
`TokenType` and operations including `BoolValue`, `HasNext`, `Next`, `NextResult`.
